arts.sum: Arsenal just fell short of the Premier League title last season and are all but out of the running this year

arts.ttl: Sterling starts, Lewis-Skelly misses out - Arsenal line-ups vs PSV Eindhoven

arts.ttl: Arsenal BOMBSHELL: New Benjamin Sesko release clause revelation
arts.sum: It was claimed that instead of a formal release clause, Sesko and Leipzig had reached a gentlemen's agreement that the No.9 would be allowed to leave in 2025 if a club were to offer a fee in that €65m ballpark. Top Arsenal target Benjamin Sesko has a formal release clause in his RB Leipzig contract, according to German media.
